narrative:
Fairfield Township has 1,043 registered voters, with 58.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.9%, a clear Republican lean of 9.8 percentage points.
